posts.title: How To Hire Fast Without Lowering Standards
posts.subtitle: Frameworks for urgent growth hiring.
posts.summary: Speed hiring only works when standards stay high. Use scorecards, tighter intake calls, parallel interviews, and faster feedback loops to reduce delays while protecting quality-of-hire.
posts.author: HireNeuronX Team

posts.title: AI In Recruiting: Hype vs Value
posts.subtitle: Where automation truly helps.
posts.summary: AI works best when it removes admin work, improves sourcing reach, and surfaces insights. Human recruiters still matter most for judgment, relationships, and closing top candidates.
posts.author: HireNeuronX Team

posts.title: Building Teams That Scale
posts.subtitle: Hiring systems for startups and SMBs.
posts.summary: Scaling teams need repeatable systems: clear hiring plans, defined competencies, interviewer training, and pipeline visibility. Strong process creates consistent growth hiring.
posts.author: HireNeuronX Team
